case_title: THAM LENH LUONG VS. CALA FOODS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CALA FOODS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY LUONG, THAM LENH CALA FOODS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUN-18-2001, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CALA FOODS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUN-18-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CALA FOODS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-17-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALA FOODS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CALA FOODS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUONG, THAM LENH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALA FOODS AS DEFENDANT WAS NOT OWNER OF PREMISES WHERE ALLEDGED INJURED OCCUPIED. DEFENDANT IS NOT LIABLE AS A MATTER OF LAW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-29-2011 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LUONG, THAM LENH AS TO DEFENDANT CALA FOODS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S SON HENGLUONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
